creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sat, Sep 25, 2010 at 10:10:03PM +0000, Wesley Shields wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR ports/149473; it has been noted by GNATS.
> 
> From: Wesley Shields <wxs@FreeBSD.org>
> To: jessekempf@gmail.com
> Cc: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
> Subject: Re: ports/149473: [maintainer update] devel/lamson unbreak
> Date: Sat, 25 Sep 2010 18:00:32 -0400
> 
>  This port still leaves behind files upon deinstall. Please see [1] for
>  the log. I'm not sure why this port wants to install the lockfile egg.

Sorry, the log is available at:

http://people.freebsd.org/~wxs/py26-lamson-1.0_1.log

-- WXS
